top5Opportunities.statement: Minimize likelihood of structural profile supply concentration in single specialty supplier for safety-critical carbody members
Minimize proportion of profile batches with material property deviations outside specified range
Minimize impact on carbody production schedule from structural profile supply disruption
Minimize likelihood of profile dimensional nonconformance undetected until fit-up in assembly jigs
Minimize likelihood of profile fit-up deviation exceeding weld prep gap tolerance

needs.statement: Increase ability to qualify new structural steel profile supplier against rail certification requirements (EN 10204 3.1, EN 15085-CL1) within standard procurement timeline
needs.importanceRationale: Supplier qualification is a significant barrier in rail; long audit and approval cycles

needs.statement: Minimize likelihood of structural profile supply concentration in single specialty supplier for safety-critical carbody members across multi-year program
needs.importanceRationale: Custom die = inherently sole-source; critical for safety-critical members

needs.statement: Minimize calendar weeks from approved cross-section drawing to first-off profile sample delivery
needs.importanceRationale: 6-12 week tooling lead for new geometry

needs.statement: Minimize likelihood of profile dimensional nonconformance remaining undetected until fit-up in carbody assembly jigs
needs.importanceRationale: Dimensional error in assembly jig causes rework cascade across full carbody

needs.statement: Minimize proportion of profile batches exhibiting material property deviations outside specified range that pass dimensional inspection
needs.importanceRationale: Hidden material property failures affect structural integrity

needs.statement: Minimize likelihood of profile fit-up deviation in carbody assembly jigs exceeding weld prep gap tolerance
needs.importanceRationale: Profile dimensional accuracy directly determines weld fit-up quality

needs.statement: Minimize time to detect tolerance drift in custom profile cross-section across successive production batches
Minimize impact on carbody production schedule from structural profile supply disruption (tooling failure, logistics, force majeure)
needs.importanceRationale: Single-source custom profiles create concentrated supply risk

needs.statement: Minimize risk of incomplete heat-number-to-finished-profile traceability gaps in vehicle homologation documentation
needs.importanceRationale: Rail homologation (TSI, EN 12663) requires complete material traceability
